info.english_meaning: to be calm to be pacified to be quiet
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: upaSamaH nASaH indriyanigrahaSca  ' Alocane Samayate SAmyatyupaSame Syani ' (Slo. 149) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'praSAmya nagaraM dAnavAMSca nihatya tAn' (BA॰vana॰172.35) praSAmya prakarzeRAlocyeti nIlakaRWaH
'tAvat saMSAmya pARqavEH' (BA0 droRa0 12219) SamaM gacCa sanDatsvetyarTaH
'vAsUdevena tIrTena putra saMSAmya pARqavEH' (BA0 droRa0 8523) SamaM gacCa sanDatsva
'budDyA saMSamayanti nItikuSalAH sAmnEva te mantriRaH' (paYcata0 1376) viroDam ityaDyAhAryam
'yadaNgArezu vyavaSAntezu lelAyadvIva carati tad devAnAmAsyam' (Apa0 SrO0 6392)
'niSamya ca bahUnvAlAnkfzRAnpucCasamASritAn' (BA0 Adi0 233) niSamya dfzwvA anyatra prAyaSo niSAnyatiH SravaRe prasidDaH
'krIqato bAlakasyeva taraya niSAmaya' (vi0 pu0 1218) niSAmaya jAnIhi
'cakzurdadAni te putra yudDaM tatra niSAmaya' (BA0 BIzma0 26) niSAmaya paSya
'agnizwe niSamayatu yadi te mana udyatam' (aTarva0 61111) nitarAM SAntaM karotvityAha
'AgacCatA mahArAja vAhIkezu niSAmitama' (BA0 karRa0 455) niSAmitaM Srutam
'punarvfdDiBayAt kiYcidanivfttaM (Bayam) niSAmayet' (BA0 SAM0 14035) niSAmayet paSyet jAnIyAt
'taTAyamapi kftakartavyaH samprati paramupaSamaM prAptaH' (pra0 ca0) upaSamo viSramaH
